Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This is how we'll be getting to school every day.[n]It's a monorail! Pretty cool, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I honestly love the ride here. It almost[n]feels like we're flying over the ocean.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Oh, by the way, our school's at the last stop[n]on this line. It's called Tatsumi Port Island.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Have you heard of it? The whole thing's man-made,[n]and our school's smack-dab in the middle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Allow me to welcome you to Gekkoukan[n]High School. I hope you like it![n]{f 1 1}
